title: Kilyown #3630
definition:
Chilion = "pining"

 1) an Ephraimite and son of Elimelech by Naomi and the deceased
    husband of Ruth (or maybe deceased husband of Orpah)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Chilion = "pining"

 1) an Ephraimite and son of Elimelech by Naomi and the deceased
    husband of Ruth (or maybe deceased husband of Orpah)
